captions.photo1: Tent spot just outside of Abisko National Park. I fell asleep watching the midnight sun struggle to stay above the mountains on the other side of the lake.

captions.photo1: Top of Trollstigen, a famous valley in Norway.
captions.photo2: Ålesund, the last stop on my first bikepacking trip ever.
captions.photo3: An enchanting view along the Flåm railway. The mist over the snow-capped mountain, the bright autumn foliage, and the coarse mountainside... Love this photo.
